Comic · One Shot · Of Gods and Of Monsters Universe

Escaping
Lusaka

An ancient Zambian deity rises. Two people stand between worlds.

← Back to Projects
TypeOne Shot Comic
Pages60
StyleBlack & White Manga
Status In Production
UniverseOf Gods & Monsters
CreatorJeremiah Chiedza

The Story

The Chikishikishi Has Come to Take Back What Is His.

Beneath the streets of Lusaka, something ancient stirs. The Chikishikishi — a deity from Zambian mythology — has awakened, and it wants its land back. What it finds is a city of people who have forgotten it exists.

Maya, a journalist chasing the story of her career, and Chola, an ex-engineer haunted by what he knows, find themselves at the centre of something they cannot explain and cannot outrun.

Escaping Lusaka is a 60-page black and white manga-style one shot with a colour cover. It is the flagship entry point into the Of Gods and Of Monsters universe — a world of African mythology colliding with modern life.

Production Notes

Format

A5 Perfect Bound · Colour Cover · B&W Interior

The Characters

Two People. One City. One God.

Journalist

Maya

She's been chasing stories her whole career. She never expected a story would chase her back. Maya is sharp, relentless, and completely unprepared for what Lusaka is about to reveal.

Ex-Engineer

Chola

He left his career for reasons he doesn't talk about. Now those reasons are standing in front of him. Chola knows more about what's happening than he's letting on — and that knowledge has a price.

The Deity

The Chikishikishi

Ancient. Patient. Angry. The Chikishikishi is not a villain — it is something older than that category. It has watched Zambia change for centuries, and now it has decided to stop watching.

The Universe

Of Gods & Monsters

Escaping Lusaka is the entry point into a larger universe of standalone one-shot comics rooted in African mythology. Each story in the Of Gods and Of Monsters universe stands alone — but every story connects.

Episodes are either "of gods" or "of monsters" — two sides of the same world, told through different lenses. Two full seasons were written in 2023. Escaping Lusaka opens the door.

Standout upcoming episodes include He Who Has No Name and Of Monsters: Man.

The Of Gods and Of Monsters universe — African stories for the world.
